title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gcc-toolset-15-dwz bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gcc-toolset-15-dwz is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The dwz package contains a program that attempts to optimize DWARF debugging information contained in ELF shared libraries and ELF executables for size, by replacing DWARF information representation with equivalent smaller representation where possible and by reducing the amount of duplication using techniques from DWARF standard appendix E - creating DW_TAG_partial_unit compilation units (CUs) for duplicated information and using DW_TAG_imported_unit to import it into each CU that needs it.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Add  gcc-toolset-15-dwz [rhel-8.10.0] (JIRA:RHEL-100326)  dwz.tests/gdb-add-index.sh fails [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101714)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for gcc-toolset-15-dwz is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The dwz package contains a program that attempts to optimize DWARF debugging information contained in ELF shared libraries and ELF executables for size, by replacing DWARF information representation with equivalent smaller representation where possible and by reducing the amount of duplication using techniques from DWARF standard appendix E - creating DW_TAG_partial_unit compilation units (CUs) for duplicated information and using DW_TAG_imported_unit to import it into each CU that needs it.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Add  gcc-toolset-15-dwz [rhel-8.10.0] (JIRA:RHEL-100326)  dwz.tests/gdb-add-index.sh fails [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101714)
